identity.name: Navy Federal Investment Services (NFIS)
identity.domain: Investing — Hybrid Advisory (Self-Directed + Robo + Financial Advisor)

total_fte.source: Not disclosed — servicing team size estimated

average_revenue_per_customer.source: Derived: blended robo + SD fee on avg AUM $4,350

data_gaps.impact: L2 and CL5 sizing depends on this
CL3 vendor rationalization excluded without this

conservative.desc: Conservative scenario: 75% of moderate benefit sizing, slower adoption curves. Reflects downside risk if cross-sell penetration is lower than projected or curve ramp takes longer.

moderate.desc: Base case with gap-based impacts sourced from Consulting Playbook (P1) and industry benchmarks (P2). Curves reflect NFIS existing digital infrastructure and executive sponsorship.

aggressive.desc: Aggressive scenario: 125% of moderate benefit sizing, faster ramp. Reflects upside if NFCU marketing engine accelerates DI awareness and Apex migration completes early.

cross_sell_revenue.name: Incremental Fee Revenue from Banking-to-DI Cross-Sell

backbase_impact.source: Gap capture rate: 40% of 2.2pp gap. P3 — standard capture rate for cross-sell with NBA engine (Digital Engage). No direct P1 investing cross-sell data in playbook; roi_levers.md Lever 1 establishes framework.

funding_recovery_revenue.name: Recovered Fee Revenue from Unfunded Account Activation

annual_new_accounts.source: Estimated: 115K-to-800K growth trajectory, conservative at 40K/yr vs 137K required (E1)

unfunded_rate.source: 50% of closed accounts never funded (E5, E21)

backbase_impact.source: P1 — Consulting Playbook: Eastern Bank (USA, Vendor: Backbase) achieved 69% funded rate vs NFIS 50%. Improvement: 19pp. Capture of unfunded pool: 19/50 = 38%. Comparable because: US bank, Backbase Digital Onboarding with Account Funding journey.

aum_uplift_revenue.name: Incremental Fee Revenue from AUM Uplift on Engaged Robo Members

backbase_impact.source: P2 — McKinsey wealth engagement research: engaged digital investors show 15-20% AUM uplift vs non-engaged. Using 15% (base estimate). Capability: Digital Engage behavioral triggers, Digital Invest goal tracking, surplus cash alerts.

L4_tier_upgrade.group_name: DI-to-FA Tier Upgrade — Automated Threshold Routing

tier_upgrade_revenue.name: Incremental Fee Revenue from DI-to-FA Conversions

eligible_members.source: Estimated: 7% of 115K DI members above FA threshold ($50K+). Grows as DI base expands.

avg_aum_eligible.source: Estimated avg AUM for threshold-eligible members

fee_delta.source: FA fee (0.65%) minus Robo fee (0.275%) = 37.5 bps delta

backbase_impact.source: P3 — Consultant assumption. No P1 playbook data for automated tier-routing in investing. No P2 published research found for 'automated AUM threshold advisor routing conversion rate'. Reasoning: 30% capture is conservative for automated detection + streamlined upgrade — members already demonstrated investing behavior. Capability: Digital Invest AUM monitoring + Digital Assist advisor notification.

acat_revenue.name: Incremental Fee Revenue from ACAT Transfer Completion Improvement

acat_attempts.source: Estimated: ACAT is top request type (E102) but volume not disclosed. Conservative estimate.

avg_transfer_aum.source: Industry benchmark: $50K-$100K per ACAT transfer (roi_levers.md Lever 3)

backbase_impact.source: P3 — Consultant assumption. No P1 playbook data for digital ACAT completion rates. roi_levers.md Lever 3 suggests +15-20% completion improvement. Using 15% conservative. Capability: Digital Onboarding guided ACAT flow + Grand Central Apex integration. Delayed curve: 0 impact Y1-Y2 due to Apex migration dependency.

robo_conversion_revenue.name: Incremental Fee Revenue from SD-to-Robo Conversions

eligible_sd_members.source: Derived: 115K × 0.333 SD mix × 20% above breakeven AUM ($15,273)

fee_delta.source: Derived: ($25K × 0.275%) - $42/yr = $68.75 - $42 = $26.75 incremental revenue per converted member

backbase_impact.source: P2 — roi_levers.md Lever 8: 3-8% SD-to-robo conversion rate. Using 5% of eligible (above-breakeven) pool = 25% of the 20% eligible segment. Capability: Digital Invest robo-advisory module + Digital Engage targeted campaigns.

retention_revenue.name: Protected Fee Revenue from Reduced Asset Outflow

total_aua.source: Total NFIS AUA including FA (E3). Justified: unified banking+investing experience benefits all tiers.

attrition_rate.source: Estimated 7% annual attrition. Not directly disclosed; wealth benchmark range 5-9% (roi_levers.md). Competitor outflow confirmed (E15, E64).

blended_fee_rate.source: Blended across DI (0.275% robo / flat SD) and FA (~0.65%). Conservative at 30 bps.

backbase_impact.source: P2 — Tangerine/Scotiabank reference (wealth/benchmarks.md): 3% attrition reduction with digital platform. NFIS using 2pp improvement (conservative). 2/7 = 0.286. Capability: Digital Invest (experience), Digital Engage (TWB model integration, retention campaigns, volatility comms).

L8_servicing_cost.group_name: Servicing Cost Reduction — Chat/Email Deflection + Process Automation

backbase_impact.source: P2/P3 — Dual-dimension: VDR 30% (mixed tasks per agent definition) + TRR 20% on remaining. Effective: 0.30 + 0.70×0.20 = 0.44. Retail benchmarks show 20-60% call deflection; 30% is conservative for investing self-service. Capability: Digital Invest self-service + AI & Agentic chatbot.
P2/P3 — Same dual-dimension as chat. VDR 30% + TRR 20%. Capability: Digital Invest self-service reduces email inquiries for routine requests.

P3 — 50% reduction in rejection rate (50% to 25%) via OCR + guided upload validation. Digital Assist document validation capability. Reasoning: OCR + real-time validation catches common errors before submission.

annual_ira_cases.source: Estimated 200/mo. IRA withdrawals are top request type (E96, E102).

processing_time_hours.source: Estimated: multi-step process across multiple teams (E96). Form fill + liquidation + settlement wait + DriveWealth ticket.

backbase_impact.source: P3 — 60% time reduction via Flow Foundation STP automation. Multi-day process to same-day for standard cases. Exception-only routing replaces full-manual. Reasoning: IRA standard withdrawals are rules-based and highly automatable. Complex cases still require human review.

advisor_referral_revenue.name: Incremental FA Revenue from Accelerated Referral Pipeline

addressable_referral_revenue.source: Prior NFIS engagement reference: $1.65M steady-state for Advisor Referral Pipeline lever (roi_levers.md NFIS reference data)

backbase_impact.source: P3 — Conservative 50% haircut applied to prior engagement figure. Reasoning: prior engagement had different scope/timing; 50% discount accounts for uncertainty. Capability: Digital Assist real-time lead routing + Digital Engage member acknowledgment.

onboarding_efficiency.name: Per-Account Processing Cost Reduction via Digital STP

addressable_cost_per_account.source: Estimated: manual components of current digital onboarding (nudge coordination, beneficiary data, back-office processing). Conservative vs roi_levers.md $250-500 range because NFIS already has digital onboarding via Fusion IQ.

backbase_impact.source: P3 — 30% efficiency gain on addressable manual processing. Reasoning: Fusion IQ already handles core onboarding; Backbase improvements target the manual gaps (E67 funding integration, E85 nudge automation, E90 beneficiary pre-population). Capability: Digital Onboarding STP + Digital Engage automated nudges.

lever_summary.name: Banking-to-DI Cross-Sell Activation
lever_summary.change_driver: NBA prompts, embedded DI in banking app

lever_summary.name: Onboarding-to-Funding Funnel Recovery
lever_summary.current_state: 50% of accounts never funded, separate flow
lever_summary.benchmark: Eastern Bank (USA, Backbase): 69% funded (Consulting Playbook P1)

lever_summary.name: AUM Growth via Digital Engagement
lever_summary.change_driver: Behavioral triggers, goal tracking, surplus alerts
lever_summary.benchmark: McKinsey: engaged investors show 15-20% AUM uplift (P2)

lever_summary.name: DI-to-FA Tier Upgrade
lever_summary.current_state: No threshold detection, absent tier transition
lever_summary.change_driver: Automated AUM monitoring and advisor routing
lever_summary.target_state: 30% of eligible DI members upgrade to FA

lever_summary.name: ACAT / Asset Consolidation
lever_summary.change_driver: Digital ACAT flow with real-time tracking

lever_summary.name: SD-to-Robo Conversion
lever_summary.current_state: No proactive conversion, 2:1 robo preference unused
lever_summary.target_state: 5% of eligible SD converts to robo annually

lever_summary.name: Advisor Referral Pipeline Acceleration
lever_summary.current_state: No automated referral routing to advisors
lever_summary.benchmark: Prior NFIS engagement: $1.65M steady-state (50% haircut applied)

lever_summary.name: Onboarding Cost Reduction
lever_summary.current_state: Manual nudges, separate funding step, no beneficiary pre-pop
lever_summary.benchmark: roi_levers.md Lever 4: $200 savings typical; discounted for existing digital (P3)

assumptions_register.validation: Validate with CUNA/NCUA credit union investing benchmarks

assumptions_register.assumption: IRA withdrawals: ~200/month (2,400/yr) at 2 hours processing each

assumptions_register.validation: Actual per-account processing cost from NFIS. Discounted from roi_levers.md $250-500 because Fusion IQ already provides digital onboarding.
